title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Music Practice Rooms
questions.text: Practice rooms can now be booked online up to two days before you need them. If you cannot use a room you booked, cancel it online so another student can take the time.
questions.question: What are students asked to do?

options.B: Cancel bookings they no longer need.
options.A: Book rooms more than two days ahead.
options.C: Use rooms without booking online first.

questions.explanation: Students should cancel unused bookings so others can use the room.

questions.heading: Message from Jamie to Lily
questions.text: Lily, I’ve just seen that the history test is in Room 11, not our usual classroom. I’m going there now to get a good seat. See you outside Room 11.
questions.question: Why has Jamie messaged Lily?

options.C: To tell her the test is in another room.
options.A: To ask her where the usual classroom is.
options.B: To say the history test is cancelled.

questions.explanation: Jamie says the test is in Room 11 instead of the usual classroom.

questions.heading: Town Park Concert
questions.text: Bring a blanket for sitting on the grass during Saturday’s concert. Chairs are only allowed in the marked area at the back, so that people sitting on blankets can still see the stage.
questions.question: What does the poster explain?

options.A: Chairs can only be used in one place.
options.B: Everyone must sit at the back.
options.C: Blankets are not allowed near the stage.

questions.explanation: Chairs are allowed only in the marked area at the back.

questions.heading: From: Dad / Subject: Your phone
questions.text: Your phone was delivered this morning, but the box looks slightly damaged. I haven’t opened it. Check it carefully when you get home, and we can contact the shop if there’s a problem.
questions.question: What does Dad want the reader to do?

options.B: Check whether the new phone is damaged.
options.A: Open the box before coming home.
options.C: Return the phone to the delivery driver.

questions.explanation: Dad wants the reader to check the phone when they get home.

questions.heading: Weekend Cooking Class
questions.text: Learn to cook three simple meals in one morning. The class is for teenagers who usually cook little or nothing at home. You will eat one dish there and take the others away.
questions.question: Who is the class for?

options.C: Teenagers with very little cooking experience.
options.A: Teenagers who already cook meals every day.
options.B: Teenagers who want to teach cooking.

questions.explanation: The class is for teenagers who usually cook little or nothing.
